conflicts.description: chapter_04 says Damian's father has been dead for years, but chapter_07 repeatedly treats Donovan Desmond as living, callable, and still exercising authority over both sons and the Desmond network.
conflicts.canonical_value: Donovan Desmond is alive and remains an active offstage authority over the Desmond family machine.
conflicts.resolution_note: chapter_07 builds multiple causally central scenes on Donovan being alive, reachable, and politically relevant. The context pack also still frames Donovan as the Desmond patriarch, so the chapter_04 dead-father line is isolated manuscript drift and not adopted as canon.

conflicts.description: The direct chapter_03 document header timestamps Anya's false report at 08:14, but chapter_13's retrospective summary calls it 09:14.
conflicts.canonical_value: Anya's false WISE assessment was filed at 08:14.
conflicts.resolution_note: The on-page chapter_03 document header is stronger evidence than a later retrospective paraphrase in chapter_13, so the original 08:14 timestamp remains canon.
